title: senecio subdiscoideus
intro: Senecio subdiscoideus, a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, is commonly known as a type of ragwort. It is traditionally used in folk medicine for its purported medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as aid in reducing fever and promoting digestive health. In herbal preparations, Senecio subdiscoideus is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its safety and efficacy have not been extensively scientifically validated.
